feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Unable to Remove or hide time from a picker in F4 value from Custom CDS based fiori app
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to remove time from picker in the value help for field CREATED ON in CDS -RAP  based custom Fiori app. Please let me know how to achieve this. Attaching screenshot for reference.

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model  SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA ABAP Extensibility

SAP Fiori Makers

entry.title: TPAR Grant Configuration
entry.content:
We are going live shortly and haven't setup TPAR. We are hoping to mitigate risk by setting up Internal Orders for capturing transactions for TPAR related Grant transactions before go-live. I haven't been able to find any detail on the config requirements and am hoping that if we setup the required internal orders before go-live, this will mitigate the risk.

The key question is; does the config require an internal order for each grant or are the grants matched to a single 'TPAR Related Grant' internal order. Any other relevant considerations?

Appreciate any advice anyone from anyone who has configured the report before.

entry.title: Possibility to connect multiple maintenance orders to a service order
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP S/4Hana Service I am trying to test a scenario of creating multiple maintenance orders (either copy, follow-up or a sub order) against a service product in a service order wherein I want to see the parent service order linkage to all those multiple maintenance orders created. 

Please help me understand where we could see that reference of parent service order. I have checked in the document flow and also in AFIH table, did not get it.

 

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Rounding does not work for manual changes of PO item
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Do you know if the following statement is valid for all types of rounding profiles?

The text is from note 2061448 - Wrong material rounding in a purchase order

 "When you enter the order quantity for the first time, the system converts the quantity and order unit automatically in accordance with the rounding proposal. If you change the order quantity, the system does not automatically adjust it."

But the note also contains the text in the bottom here and I am wondering if this means that rounding can be automatical done after manual change of the QTY if you are using a static profile. 

Resolution

The system is working as designed.

You can use static rounding for this purpose, check the Help document Static Rounding Profiles

rgds

GAR

entry.title: Where are Tcode that are deprecated in S/4 and a new one that added to S/4 HANA?
entry.content: Where can I get list of transaction codes for technical team (Basis/Security) that have been deprecated SAP S/4 HANA, as well as the new ones that have been introduced?

entry.title: Custom Logic - Sales Document Item Check - Messages
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In Custom Fields Fiori app under Custom Logic, I implemented "Sales Item Check" BADI under Business Context Sales: Sales Document Item.

Purpose was to validate some Custom fields from Additional Data A tab on the Sales Order in the BADI in method CHECK_FIELDS

The way to raise an error message in this BADI method is to fill messages parameter table like below

 

append value #( messagetype = 'E' messagetext = 'Value missing for field YY1_FIELD_SDI.'  ) to messages.

 

 
The raised message then goes into VA01/VA02 log (accessed by clicking CTRL+SHIFT+F2)
 
 
The Log button on Clicking will show the error message like below

Now the issue I am facing is, even if the Error is corrected on the Item, the message in the log still remains. We can only append new message in the messages table of the BADI method but there is nothing in the documentation about how to remove an existing error message from the log

How, can we remove the message from the log once we find the error is resolved?

Best regards

entry.title: How to check recommended server specs for SAP S/4HAHA Private Cloud system?
entry.content:
Hello! 

We would like to know if there is a way to check the recommended server spec to run our SAP S/4HANA private cloud system (DB capacity, OS etc)

Is there a way to check recommended spec by SAP for each system?

entry.title: Preassignment of tax categories in customer output tax is not working in migration cockpit
entry.content:
When a customer BP is created and extended to a sales org, output tax table entries are added automatically. Once the tax categories are determined automatically, user has to just enter value for tax classification. 

While extending a customer through migration cockpit, this functionality is not working. 

How can user update this without having to manually add each tax category as there will be thousands of entries with bulk uploads?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: approve purchase orders through my inbox
entry.content:
I am looking for information to implement in the launchpad of my erp S/4 HANA 2022 FPS02 , the fiori application “My Inbox”. I understand that having an active and configured workflow, from “My Inbox” you can approve purchase orders.
(I found the app “My Inbox - Approve purchase order” but it is obsolete).
My question is the following since I did not find any information: When implementing my inbox, how does this application know that I want to approve purchase orders only and not do anything else?
I think this is very role related, but I would like someone who knows more about this to explain me better.
Thank you very much.

entry.title: Best Practice additional scope id activation
entry.content:
We have activated BP Z_US_SOLUTION. Now we have a requirement to activate additional scope item in this solution.

About this scenario, SAP note 2938086 states the following:

"At a later point of time, if you need more scope items to be activated, you can change the Z_CUST solution and add the scope items you need, then activate them in Implementation Assistant.”

Question:

  • Can we just edit the solution activated and further activate the scope item needed? If so can we transport the activation of scope item from BP client to business client?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Explode BOM with previous or new production version?
entry.content:
Dear Expert:

We are doing system conversion from ECC 6 to S4 HANA. As the production version is mandatory in S4. we create PV for BOM header material. After that to create sub contracting PO, if we click the "Explode BOM" button in Item-->Material Data view, a window pop-up with message" Previous production version differs from prod. version 0001. Explode BOM with previous or new production version?" Is it possible to stop this message pop-up?

Best Regards

entry.title: Custom Field - SAP S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

The requirement is to create a custom field on the Manage Customer Master Data app inside the sales areas section and there needs to be predefined set of drop down values to be added to that custom field.

I know how to create a custom field in customer master, but not sure how to create one inside the section of sales areas tab under master data and also no clue on how to add drop down values to that.

If somebody could throw some insights on the above requirement would be helpful.

SAP Fiori SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: Implement Page level security in custom UI5 application
entry.content:
Not able to Implement Page level security in custom UI5 application.

Our  custom SAPUI5 application deployed in SAP BTP.

In our application there are 3 pages, we want to restrict the page access according to the user authorization. Roles are maintained in BTP security.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom field logic - Data source extension
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to add field Total value of valuated stock (MBEW-SALK3) into Create Physical inventory Fiori app. So, we have three associations for data source extensibility for C_PHYSINVTRYPROPOSAL :

I have added my field to the last association in the extension CDS:

Exposed this field in extended view for I_ProductPlant

But my new field is not appearing in the Data source extension of  C_PHYSINVTRYPROPOSAL  in key user extensibility:

I am expecting that field should come in _ProductPlant association

 

Can someone please help on this? Is my approach correct?

 

Regards,

Ashish Pandey

entry.title: Form Template for Supplier Invoice which Entry Type = [Online] and [Invoice from Parking Function]
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Supplier Invoice with Entry Type=ESR have output tab and we can view the form template for those Supplier Invoices.

 

But supplier invoice with other Entry Type= Online, Invoice from Parking function and etc.. do not have output tab and we cannot view the form template. Only ESR type can view form template.

Could you please guide us how to view the form template for supplier invoices with other entry types?

#Supplier Invoice template, #template for Entry Type Online, #template for SIV entry type

entry.title: how to assign the FICO Form in the place of standard form
entry.content:
how to assign customised sapscript form in the place of standard one for cash journal in FICO.... can anybody give me the exact solution I tried to assigned it in ob96 and then fbcjc3 but the output in fbcj is standard form only....

can anybody give me the solution for this problem

entry.title: An OBD is creating for batch managed product even if there is no batch with matching selection crite
entry.content:
I have enabled batch management for certain products in my system. I have set a selection criteria in my search strategy as follows: Remaining shelf life should be > 360 d

When I create an Outbound delivery, I see it picks the right batch based on this rule which is great.

However, even if I do not have stock with enough remaining shelf life, it still allows me to create the OBD! It creates without the batch split

I have reached out to SAP and they have said this is working fine and I need to create an enhancement if I want to change behavior. I dont understand why this is not supported by standard. I feel I am missing some setting.. Any ideas?  MAN Batch Management EWM - Delivery Processing

entry.title: Stock on Hand using 2LIS_03_BF
entry.content:
Hi There,

I have a requirement to calculate the following , stock on hand for a given day using a SQL given we have the following extractors enabled  2LIS_03_BF (MSEG) & 2LIS_03_UM

  • Inventory QTY
  • Inventory unit cost
  • Inventory Value
  • In network in transit Qty
  • In network in transit Value

Any suggestions or  any help would be much appreciated.  The client does not want to use MATDOC and MATDOC_EXTRACT for their reporting but would like to use the above two extractors.

 

Thanks

Nick

entry.title: main item & free goods item
entry.content:
if we create Free Goods Condition with main item 5 piece and one piece as free item. then, in delivery we modify main item to 4 pieces, then we note that the 1 Piece of free goods complete to the issue and billing.

we need to issue and billing with the delivery qty.

entry.title: Planning of materials provided to Subcon Vendor at MRP Area level
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requriement, the planning of components that are provided to a subcontracting Vendor should be planned seperately at different MRP area level. Detailed explanation is as follows,

  1. A finished material (FG123) has a BOM component (SFG123) that undergoes material subcontracting process.
  2. The Finished material (FG123) is produced in two differnent MRP Area (1234_A &1234_B) which is of type 02 (Storage Location MRP Area).
  3. The Dependent Requirement of SFG123 will also be generated at each MRP area seperately.
  4. Post MRP Run, the Subcon PR for SFG123 will be generated at each MRP Area.
  5. The Subcontractor requirements of the Material provided (SubReq) of the components that are provided to the vendor is only generated at plant level and not at each MRP Area level, hence the procurement will also be done only at plant level.

The business requriement is to generate the SubReq seperately at each MRP Area level and the subsequent procurement proposal for RM123 to be generated at S.Loc MRP Area seperately and not at the Plant MRP Area level.

Pls let me know if it is possible to create SubReq and PR at MRP Area for RM123.

 

Thanks in Advance.
